reasoning: Avatar: The Way of Water concluded its main box office run with an approximate worldwide gross of $2.32 billion. This places it well behind the all-time record held by the original Avatar, which stands at around $2.92 billion. A gap of $600 million remains, meaning it would take an unprecedentedly massive series of re-releases before December 31, 2025, for Avatar 2 to bridge this gap. Given that typical re-releases earn in the tens of millions rather than hundreds of millions, this is virtually impossible. The Manifold market was accurately pricing this at 1%. Thus, the probability of Avatar 2 becoming the highest-grossing movie of all time by the end of 2025 is extremely low.
